predictedBugs: Race condition in workerLoop if two workers pick overlapping indices — nextIndex++ is non-atomic without lock, but single-threaded JS avoids this
Temp file path collision if two runs happen simultaneously with same context file — mitigated by runId with random suffix
Agent runner fails silently if JSON stdout is too large and split across multiple data events — stdout buffer accumulation handles this
edgeCases: Empty dimensions array should return empty result immediately (handled: early return in spawnAgents)
All agents timeout simultaneously — each timeout is independent via per-agent setTimeout
Single-core machine (1 CPU) — computeDefaultMaxParallel floors at min(16, 1-2) = 1, not 0 or negative
